name: Nikon Z50 Mirrorless Camera
description: Sporting an especially sleek design, the Nikon Z50 is a DX-format mirrorless digital camera revolving around the versatile Z Mount. Capable in both stills and video realms, the Z50 features a 20.9MP CMOS sensor and EXPEED 6 image processor.

features.Key Features:: 20.9MP DX-Format CMOS Sensor | EXPEED 6 Image Processor | UHD 4K and Full HD Video Recording | 2.36m-Dot OLED Electronic Viewfinder | 3.2" 1.04m-Dot 180° Tilting Touchscreen | ISO 100-51200, Up to 11 fps Shooting | 209-Point Hybrid AF, Eye Detection | Built-In Wi-Fi and Bluetooth
features.Body Only: Nikon Z50 Mirrorless Camera (Refurbished by Nikon USA) | Nikon EN-EL25 Rechargeable Lithium-Ion Battery (7.6V, 1120mAh) | Nikon MH-32 Battery Charger | Nikon UC-E21 USB Type-A Male to Type-B Micro Male Cable (Black) | Nikon AN-DC20 Camera Strap | Nikon BF-N1 Body Cap | DK-30 Rubber Eyecup
features.Kit 16-50mm: Nikon EN-EL25 Rechargeable Lithium-Ion Battery (7.6V, 1120mAh) | Nikon MH-32 Battery Charger | Nikon UC-E21 USB Type-A Male to Type-B Micro Male Cable (Black) | Nikon AN-DC20 Camera Strap | Nikon BF-N1 Body Cap | DK-30 Rubber Eyecup
features.Kit 16-50mm + 50-250m: Nikon EN-EL25 Rechargeable Lithium-Ion Battery (7.6V, 1120mAh) | Nikon MH-32 Battery Charger | Nikon UC-E21 USB Type-A Male to Type-B Micro Male Cable (Black) | Nikon AN-DC20 Camera Strap | Nikon BF-N1 Body Cap | DK-30 Rubber Eyecup
